description_long: This is a life-sized adult pedestrian figure dressed in a form-fitting, futuristic bodysuit with glowing blue accents running along the limbs and torso. The individual has a well-defined, athletic build and stands with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The face is detailed, with short, styled hair pulled back into a bun, and the expression is neutral. The suit appears to be made of a synthetic, possibly neoprene-like material, and is paired with sturdy, ankle-high boots. Several small, tech-like accessories or devices are visible floating above the head, suggesting a high-tech or sci-fi context. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, suitable for urban or advanced technological environments.
description: An athletic adult in a sleek, futuristic bodysuit with glowing blue accents, standing in a T-pose with tech accessories above the head.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed face, chest suit design, and glowing blue lines on the suit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the suit's contour, and the bun hairstyle.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the suit's rear design, blue accents along the spine and legs, and the back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the profile, suit fit, and the bun hairstyle from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic form-fitting bodysuit with glowing accents and ankle-high boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally (T-pose)
attribute_hairstyle: short hair styled into a bun
